api.name: StatusBestKnown
api.doc:
StatusBestKnown is a verified partial heuristic plan without infeasibility
proof.

api.name: StatusBudgetExhausted
api.doc:
StatusBudgetExhausted is the best safe verified result when bounded search
stops early.

api.name: StatusFeasible
api.doc: StatusFeasible is a complete independently verified non-optimal plan.

api.name: StatusInfeasible
api.doc: StatusInfeasible is exhaustive proof that no complete plan exists.

api.name: StatusOptimal
api.doc: StatusOptimal is a complete plan proven optimal by the exact solver.

api.name: TerminationBranchLimit
api.doc: TerminationBranchLimit means MaxBranches was reached.

api.name: TerminationCancelled
api.doc: TerminationCancelled means context cancellation stopped work.

api.name: TerminationCandidateLimit
api.doc: TerminationCandidateLimit means MaxCandidatePlacements was reached.

api.name: TerminationCompleted
api.doc: TerminationCompleted means the selected solver strategy finished.

api.name: TerminationDeadline
api.doc: TerminationDeadline means the context deadline expired.

api.name: TerminationMemoryLimit
api.doc: TerminationMemoryLimit means the conservative memory budget was exceeded.

api.name: TerminationNoPlacement
api.doc: TerminationNoPlacement means a heuristic could not place every item.

api.name: TerminationNodeLimit
api.doc: TerminationNodeLimit means MaxSearchNodes was reached.

api.name: CenterOfGravityBounds.MaxXPPM
api.doc: MaxXPPM is the inclusive horizontal X-axis upper bound.

api.name: CenterOfGravityBounds.MaxYPPM
api.doc: MaxYPPM is the inclusive horizontal Y-axis upper bound.

api.name: CenterOfGravityBounds.MaxZPPM
api.doc: MaxZPPM is the inclusive vertical Z-axis upper bound.

api.name: CenterOfGravityBounds.MinXPPM
api.doc: MinXPPM is the inclusive horizontal X-axis lower bound.

api.name: CenterOfGravityBounds.MinYPPM
api.doc: MinYPPM is the inclusive horizontal Y-axis lower bound.

api.name: CenterOfGravityBounds.MinZPPM
api.doc: MinZPPM is the inclusive vertical Z-axis lower bound.

api.name: ContainerInstance.ID
api.doc: ID is the unique deterministic instance identity.

api.name: ContainerInstance.TypeID
api.doc: TypeID refers to a NormalizedContainer.ID in the request.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.AllowedClasses
api.doc: AllowedClasses is a copied canonical allowlist for item class attributes.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.CenterOfGravity
api.doc: CenterOfGravity optionally constrains the combined content mass center.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.ExternalDimensions
api.doc: ExternalDimensions optionally describe non-feasibility shipping size.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.ID
api.doc: ID is the required unique type identity.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.InternalDimensions
api.doc: InternalDimensions are the exact usable physical lengths.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.MaxContentWeight
api.doc: MaxContentWeight is the exact positive content mass limit.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.MaxGrossWeight
api.doc: MaxGrossWeight optionally limits tare plus content mass.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.MaxItemCount
api.doc: MaxItemCount limits placements per instance; zero means unrestricted.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.Priority
api.doc: Priority is the deterministic type ordering after objective equivalence.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.Reserved
api.doc: Reserved is a copied set of unusable cuboids inside internal dimensions.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.Stock
api.doc: Stock explicitly selects finite or unlimited availability.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec.TareWeight
api.doc: TareWeight is the optional non-negative empty-container mass.

api.name: Diagnostic.Code
api.doc: Code is the stable diagnostic category.

api.name: Diagnostic.ContainerID
api.doc: ContainerID optionally scopes the diagnostic to an instance or type.

api.name: Diagnostic.ItemID
api.doc: ItemID optionally scopes the diagnostic to an item.

api.name: Diagnostic.Message
api.doc: Message is the bounded human-readable explanation.

api.name: FieldError.Category
api.doc: Category is the stable sentinel returned by Unwrap.

api.name: FieldError.Field
api.doc: Field is the machine-readable input field name when known.

api.name: FieldError.ID
api.doc: ID is the affected item or container ID when known.

api.name: FieldError.Reason
api.doc: Reason is the human-readable validation detail.

api.name: ItemSpec.Attributes
api.doc: Attributes is copied caller metadata used by eligibility constraints.

api.name: ItemSpec.Dimensions
api.doc: Dimensions are exact positive physical lengths.

api.name: ItemSpec.FragileTop
api.doc: FragileTop forbids any item from using this item as a supporter.

api.name: ItemSpec.Group
api.doc: Group requires all same-group items to share one container.

api.name: ItemSpec.ID
api.doc: ID is the required unique logical item identity.

api.name: ItemSpec.IncompatibleGroups
api.doc: IncompatibleGroups may not share a container with this item.

api.name: ItemSpec.MaxStackCount
api.doc:
MaxStackCount bounds the number of supported levels above this item; zero
means no stack-depth constraint.

api.name: ItemSpec.MaxSupportedWeight
api.doc: MaxSupportedWeight is the optional non-negative total transitive load.

api.name: ItemSpec.MinimumSupportPPM
api.doc: MinimumSupportPPM is the required supported footprint in millionths.

api.name: ItemSpec.Orientations
api.doc: Orientations is the nonempty allowed physical-axis permutation set.

api.name: ItemSpec.Priority
api.doc: Priority is an exact caller value used by PackedPriority objectives.

api.name: ItemSpec.SKU
api.doc: SKU is optional caller metadata and does not establish identity.

api.name: ItemSpec.Weight
api.doc: Weight is the exact positive item mass.

api.name: Limits.MaxBranches
api.doc: MaxBranches bounds exact-search edges and container configurations.

api.name: Limits.MaxCandidatePlacements
api.doc: MaxCandidatePlacements bounds heuristic and exact placement attempts.

api.name: Limits.MaxContainerTypes
api.doc: MaxContainerTypes bounds distinct container definitions.

api.name: Limits.MaxDiagnostics
api.doc: MaxDiagnostics bounds verifier and solver diagnostic collections.

api.name: Limits.MaxIDBytes
api.doc: MaxIDBytes bounds each item, type, and instance identifier.

api.name: Limits.MaxImprovementRounds
api.doc: MaxImprovementRounds bounds complete heuristic repacking passes.

api.name: Limits.MaxItems
api.doc: MaxItems bounds normalized item instances.

api.name: Limits.MaxMemoryBytes
api.doc: MaxMemoryBytes bounds conservative request and solver working estimates.

api.name: Limits.MaxOrientations
api.doc: MaxOrientations bounds allowed orientations per item.

api.name: Limits.MaxSearchNodes
api.doc: MaxSearchNodes bounds exact-search states.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.AllowedClasses
api.doc: AllowedClasses is a copied item-class allowlist.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.CenterOfGravity
api.doc: CenterOfGravity optionally bounds combined content mass by axis PPM.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.Dimensions
api.doc: Dimensions are positive usable length-lattice counts.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.HasGrossWeight
api.doc: HasGrossWeight distinguishes an absent limit from a numeric value.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.ID
api.doc: ID is the unique container type identity.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.MaxContentWeight
api.doc: MaxContentWeight is the positive content mass-lattice limit.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.MaxGrossWeight
api.doc: MaxGrossWeight is tare plus content capacity when HasGrossWeight is true.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.MaxItemCount
api.doc: MaxItemCount limits placements per instance; zero is unrestricted.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.Priority
api.doc: Priority is the deterministic type-ordering value.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.Reserved
api.doc: Reserved is a copied set of unusable cuboids inside Dimensions.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.Stock
api.doc: Stock explicitly selects finite or unlimited type availability.

api.name: NormalizedContainer.TareWeight
api.doc: TareWeight is the non-negative empty-container mass-lattice value.

api.name: NormalizedItem.Attributes
api.doc: Attributes is copied metadata used by eligibility constraints.

api.name: NormalizedItem.Dimensions
api.doc: Dimensions are positive length-lattice counts.

api.name: NormalizedItem.FragileTop
api.doc: FragileTop forbids supported placements above this item.

api.name: NormalizedItem.Group
api.doc: Group requires co-location with all items carrying the same value.

api.name: NormalizedItem.ID
api.doc: ID is the unique logical item identity.

api.name: NormalizedItem.IncompatibleGroups
api.doc: IncompatibleGroups may not share a container with this item.

api.name: NormalizedItem.MaxStackCount
api.doc: MaxStackCount bounds supported levels above; zero is unrestricted.

api.name: NormalizedItem.MaxSupportedWeight
api.doc: MaxSupportedWeight is an optional non-negative mass-lattice load limit.

api.name: NormalizedItem.MinimumSupportPPM
api.doc: MinimumSupportPPM is required footprint support in millionths.

api.name: NormalizedItem.Orientations
api.doc: Orientations is the canonical nonempty allowed permutation set.

api.name: NormalizedItem.Priority
api.doc: Priority is the exact PackedPriority objective contribution.

api.name: NormalizedItem.SKU
api.doc: SKU is optional non-identity metadata.

api.name: NormalizedItem.Weight
api.doc: Weight is a positive mass-lattice count.

api.name: NormalizedSpec.Containers
api.doc: Containers are already expressed in the selected integer lattice.

api.name: NormalizedSpec.Items
api.doc: Items are already expressed in the selected integer lattice.

api.name: NormalizedSpec.Limits
api.doc: Limits bounds construction, solving, verification, and diagnostics.

api.name: NormalizedSpec.Resolution
api.doc: Resolution preserves the exact physical meaning of lattice units.

api.name: PhysicalDimensions.X
api.doc: X is the exact physical width.

api.name: PhysicalDimensions.Y
api.doc: Y is the exact physical depth.

api.name: PhysicalDimensions.Z
api.doc: Z is the exact physical height.

api.name: Placement.ContainerID
api.doc: ContainerID refers to one ContainerInstance.ID.

api.name: Placement.Diagnostics
api.doc: Diagnostics is bounded non-authoritative placement metadata.

api.name: Placement.Dimensions
api.doc: Dimensions are the recomputable oriented lattice lengths.

api.name: Placement.ItemID
api.doc: ItemID refers to exactly one NormalizedItem.ID.

api.name: Placement.Orientation
api.doc: Orientation is the selected allowed physical-axis permutation.

api.name: Placement.Origin
api.doc: Origin is the non-negative lower lattice corner.

api.name: Placement.SupporterIDs
api.doc: SupporterIDs is the canonical set of items with positive contact beneath.

api.name: Placement.Weight
api.doc: Weight is the recomputable item mass-lattice count.

api.name: PlanLimits.MaxBytes
api.doc: MaxBytes bounds the conservative owned plan-size estimate.

api.name: PlanLimits.MaxContainers
api.doc: MaxContainers bounds selected instance records.

api.name: PlanLimits.MaxDiagnostics
api.doc: MaxDiagnostics bounds plan and placement diagnostics combined.

api.name: PlanLimits.MaxIDBytes
api.doc: MaxIDBytes bounds every item, type, instance, and supporter ID.

api.name: PlanLimits.MaxMetadataBytes
api.doc: MaxMetadataBytes bounds each diagnostic and objective string.

api.name: PlanLimits.MaxObjectiveComponents
api.doc: MaxObjectiveComponents bounds lexicographic score records.

api.name: PlanLimits.MaxPlacements
api.doc: MaxPlacements bounds placement records.

api.name: PlanLimits.MaxUnpackedItems
api.doc: MaxUnpackedItems bounds partial-result identity records.

api.name: PlanSpec.Containers
api.doc: Containers is the selected canonical container instance list.

api.name: PlanSpec.Diagnostics
api.doc: Diagnostics contains bounded non-authoritative plan metadata.

api.name: PlanSpec.Objective
api.doc: Objective contains exact components in precedence order.

api.name: PlanSpec.Placements
api.doc: Placements contains at most one entry for each packed item.

api.name: PlanSpec.Statistics
api.doc: Statistics contains independently recomputable aggregates.

api.name: PlanSpec.Status
api.doc: Status states the level of feasibility or proof claimed.

api.name: PlanSpec.Termination
api.doc: Termination states why solver work stopped.

api.name: PlanSpec.UnpackedItemIDs
api.doc: UnpackedItemIDs identifies omitted items for permitted partial plans.

api.name: PlanSpec.Work
api.doc: Work contains deterministic bounded search counters.

api.name: ReservedRegion.Dimensions
api.doc: Dimensions are exact positive physical lengths.

api.name: ReservedRegion.Origin
api.doc: Origin is the non-negative lower lattice corner.

api.name: Resolution.Length
api.doc: Length is the exact coordinate and dimension lattice step.

api.name: Resolution.Mass
api.doc: Mass is the exact weight and load lattice step.

api.name: ScoreComponent.Direction
api.doc: Direction is either "min" or "max".

api.name: ScoreComponent.Name
api.doc: Name is the stable objective metric identifier.

api.name: ScoreComponent.Unit
api.doc: Unit identifies the exact count, lattice, priority, or currency domain.

api.name: ScoreComponent.Value
api.doc: Value is the canonical exact decimal representation.

api.name: Statistics.ContainerCount
api.doc: ContainerCount is the selected instance count.

api.name: Statistics.ContainerVolume
api.doc: ContainerVolume is total selected usable lattice volume.

api.name: Statistics.ItemVolume
api.doc: ItemVolume is total packed volume in cubed length-lattice units.

api.name: Statistics.ItemWeight
api.doc: ItemWeight is total packed mass in request lattice units.

api.name: Statistics.PackedItems
api.doc: PackedItems is the placement count.

api.name: Statistics.RemainingVolume
api.doc: RemainingVolume is container volume minus item volume.

api.name: Statistics.RemainingWeight
api.doc: RemainingWeight is unused content capacity in mass-lattice units.

api.name: Work.Branches
api.doc: Branches is the number of exact-search edges or configurations considered.

api.name: Work.CandidatePlacements
api.doc: CandidatePlacements is the number of orientation-position attempts.

api.name: Work.ImprovementRounds
api.doc: ImprovementRounds is the number of complete heuristic repacking passes.

api.name: Work.Nodes
api.doc: Nodes is the number of exact-search states entered.

api.name: Work.Seed
api.doc: Seed is the caller-provided reproducibility value.

api.name: Work.Solver
api.doc: Solver is the stable solver implementation identifier.

api.name: Work.Strategy
api.doc: Strategy is the stable search-strategy identifier.

api.name: DefaultLimits
api.doc: DefaultLimits returns conservative nonzero bounds for untrusted server work.

api.name: DefaultPlanLimits
api.doc:
DefaultPlanLimits returns conservative limits for server-side untrusted
plan construction.

api.name: ExpandQuantity
api.doc: ExpandQuantity creates stable instance IDs without retaining caller aliases.

api.name: ExpandQuantityWithLimit
api.signature: func(spec ItemSpec, quantity, maximum uint32) ([]Item, error)
api.doc:
ExpandQuantityWithLimit expands at most maximum instances and rejects the
request before allocating when the caller's quantity budget would be
exceeded.

api.name: FiniteStock
api.doc:
FiniteStock constructs availability of count containers; constructors reject
a zero finite count.

api.name: NewContainerType
api.doc:
NewContainerType validates dimensions, mass limits, stock, and reserved
regions, then defensively copies caller-owned state.

api.name: NewItem
api.doc: NewItem validates the domain model and defensively copies all collections.

api.name: NewNormalizedRequest
api.doc:
NewNormalizedRequest validates a pre-scaled request, rejects duplicate IDs
and overflow, canonicalizes ordering, and defensively copies all aliases.

api.name: NewPlan
api.doc: NewPlan validates and defensively copies spec using DefaultPlanLimits.

api.name: NewPlanWithLimits
api.doc:
NewPlanWithLimits validates resource bounds before taking defensive copies
of the supplied plan.

api.name: NewRequest
api.signature: func(items []Item, containers []ContainerType, resolution Resolution, limits Limits) (Request, error)
api.doc:
NewRequest validates exact physical values, requires exact lattice
conversion, rejects ambiguous IDs, and owns defensive copies.

api.name: UnlimitedStock
api.doc: UnlimitedStock constructs explicitly unbounded container availability.

api.name: ContainerType.AllowedClasses
api.doc: AllowedClasses returns a defensive copy in canonical order.

api.name: ContainerType.CenterOfGravity
api.doc: CenterOfGravity returns a copy of the optional content-mass bounds.

api.name: ContainerType.ID
api.doc: ID returns the unique container type identity.

api.name: ContainerType.InternalDimensions
api.doc: InternalDimensions returns exact usable physical dimensions.

api.name: ContainerType.MaxContentWeight
api.doc: MaxContentWeight returns the exact content mass limit.

api.name: ContainerType.MaxGrossWeight
api.doc: MaxGrossWeight returns a copy of the optional tare-plus-content mass limit.

api.name: ContainerType.MaxItemCount
api.doc: MaxItemCount returns the per-instance count limit, or zero when unrestricted.

api.name: ContainerType.Priority
api.doc: Priority returns the deterministic type priority.

api.name: ContainerType.Reserved
api.doc: Reserved returns a defensive copy of unusable regions.

api.name: ContainerType.Stock
api.doc: Stock returns finite or unlimited availability.

api.name: ContainerType.TareWeight
api.doc: TareWeight returns a copy of the optional exact empty-container mass.

api.name: FieldError.Error
api.doc: Error formats the stable category with optional ID, field, and reason.

api.name: FieldError.Unwrap
api.doc: Unwrap returns Category for errors.Is and errors.As chains.

api.name: Item.Attributes
api.doc: Attributes returns a defensive copy of caller metadata.

api.name: Item.Dimensions
api.doc: Dimensions returns exact physical dimensions.

api.name: Item.FragileTop
api.doc: FragileTop reports whether the item may bear any other item.

api.name: Item.Group
api.doc: Group returns the required co-location group.

api.name: Item.ID
api.doc: ID returns the unique item identity.

api.name: Item.IncompatibleGroups
api.doc: IncompatibleGroups returns a defensive copy in canonical order.

api.name: Item.MaxStackCount
api.doc: MaxStackCount returns the allowed levels above, or zero when unrestricted.

api.name: Item.MaxSupportedWeight
api.doc: MaxSupportedWeight returns a copy of the optional exact load limit.

api.name: Item.MinimumSupportPPM
api.doc: MinimumSupportPPM returns the required footprint support in millionths.

api.name: Item.Orientations
api.doc: Orientations returns a defensive copy of allowed permutations.

api.name: Item.Priority
api.doc: Priority returns the exact subset-selection priority.

api.name: Item.SKU
api.doc: SKU returns optional non-identity metadata.

api.name: Item.Weight
api.doc: Weight returns the exact physical mass.

api.name: Limits.Valid
api.doc:
validateForSolver is exposed within the module through a stable boolean
helper so subpackages can reject malformed copied limits.

api.name: NormalizedRequest.ContainerTypeCount
api.doc: ContainerTypeCount returns the bounded distinct container type count.

api.name: NormalizedRequest.Containers
api.doc: Containers returns defensive copies in canonical type-ID order.

api.name: NormalizedRequest.ItemCount
api.doc: ItemCount returns the bounded normalized item instance count.

api.name: NormalizedRequest.Items
api.doc: Items returns deep defensive copies in canonical ID order.

api.name: NormalizedRequest.Limits
api.doc: Limits returns the request's copied resource policy.

api.name: NormalizedRequest.MemoryBytes
api.doc: MemoryBytes returns the conservative normalized-input memory estimate.

api.name: NormalizedRequest.Resolution
api.doc: Resolution returns the exact physical lattice steps.

api.name: NormalizedRequest.WithLimits
api.doc: WithLimits returns a copy using caller-selected bounded work limits.

api.name: Plan.CanonicalString
api.doc:
CanonicalString returns deterministic compact JSON for comparison and
tie-breaking; persistence should use the versioned encoding package.

api.name: Plan.Containers
api.doc: Containers returns a defensive copy in canonical order.

api.name: Plan.Diagnostics
api.doc: Diagnostics returns a defensive copy of non-authoritative metadata.

api.name: Plan.Objective
api.doc: Objective returns a defensive copy in lexicographic precedence order.

api.name: Plan.Placements
api.doc: Placements returns deep defensive copies in canonical order.

api.name: Plan.Spec
api.doc: Spec returns a deep defensive copy suitable for serialization or mutation.

api.name: Plan.Statistics
api.doc: Statistics returns independently recomputable aggregates.

api.name: Plan.Status
api.doc: Status returns the claimed feasibility or proof level.

api.name: Plan.Termination
api.doc: Termination returns the exact reason solver work stopped.

api.name: Plan.UnpackedItemIDs
api.doc: UnpackedItemIDs returns a defensive copy in canonical order.

api.name: Plan.Work
api.doc: Work returns deterministic search counters.

api.name: Request.Normalized
api.doc: Normalized returns a deep defensive copy of canonical lattice input.

api.name: Stock.Count
api.doc: Count returns finite availability, or zero for unlimited stock.

api.name: Stock.Unlimited
api.doc: Unlimited reports whether Count is inapplicable.

api.name: CenterOfGravityBounds
api.doc:
CenterOfGravityBounds constrains the combined content center of gravity on
each container axis. Values are inclusive millionths of the internal axis
length. Item mass is modeled at the geometric center of a uniform cuboid.

api.name: ContainerInstance
api.doc: ContainerInstance identifies one selected copy of a container type.

api.name: ContainerType
api.doc: ContainerType is immutable from the caller's perspective.

api.name: ContainerTypeSpec
api.doc:
ContainerTypeSpec defines one validated reusable container type. New values
own defensive copies of all pointer and slice fields.

api.name: Diagnostic
api.doc:
Diagnostic is bounded human-readable solver metadata and never replaces
independent verification.

api.name: FieldError
api.doc:
FieldError supplies stable machine-readable context while supporting
errors.Is/errors.As through its wrapped category.

api.name: Item
api.doc: Item is immutable from the caller's perspective.

api.name: ItemSpec
api.doc: ItemSpec is copied and validated by NewItem.

api.name: Limits
api.doc: Limits bounds normalization and solver work before allocations occur.

api.name: NormalizedContainer
api.doc:
NormalizedContainer is a validated integer-lattice container type.
NewNormalizedRequest owns defensive copies of collection fields.

api.name: NormalizedItem
api.doc:
NormalizedItem is a validated integer-lattice item. NewNormalizedRequest
owns defensive copies of every slice, map, and pointer field.

api.name: NormalizedRequest
api.signature:
struct {
	items		[]NormalizedItem
	containers	[]NormalizedContainer
	resolution	Resolution
	limits		Limits
	memoryBytes	uint64
}
api.doc:
NormalizedRequest is immutable validated solver input with canonical item
and container ordering.

api.name: NormalizedSpec
api.doc:
NormalizedSpec is the validated wire boundary for an already lattice-scaled
request. It exists for strict decoding and corpus fixtures.

api.name: PhysicalDimensions
api.doc: PhysicalDimensions are exact public-boundary lengths on named axes.

api.name: Placement
api.doc:
Placement records one item's immutable lattice position and derived support
evidence.

api.name: Plan
api.doc: Plan owns defensive copies and only exposes copies of collection state.

api.name: PlanLimits
api.doc:
PlanLimits bounds direct plan construction before collection cloning or
canonical serialization can amplify untrusted data.

api.name: PlanSpec
api.doc: PlanSpec is the owned serialization boundary validated by NewPlanWithLimits.

api.name: Request
api.doc: Request is immutable exact physical input normalized at construction.

api.name: ReservedRegion
api.doc: ReservedRegion is expressed in the request lattice after normalization.

api.name: Resolution
api.doc:
Resolution defines exact positive length and mass lattice steps. Every input
quantity must be exactly divisible unless a future explicit rounding API is
selected.

api.name: ScoreComponent
api.doc: ScoreComponent is one exact serializable objective value in precedence order.

api.name: Statistics
api.doc: Statistics contains verifier-recomputable exact plan aggregates.

api.name: Status
api.doc:
Status distinguishes feasible evidence, exhaustive proof, heuristic partial
results, and interrupted search.

api.name: Stock
api.doc: Stock explicitly distinguishes finite stock from unlimited availability.

api.name: TerminationReason
api.doc: TerminationReason identifies why solver work stopped independently of status.

api.name: Work
api.doc: Work records deterministic bounded search counters, not wall-clock timing.

api.name: ErrBudgetExhausted
api.doc: ErrBudgetExhausted identifies a work limit reached before proof completion.

api.name: ErrConflictingConstraint
api.doc: ErrConflictingConstraint identifies mutually inconsistent domain rules.

api.name: ErrDuplicateID
api.doc: ErrDuplicateID identifies ambiguous item or container identity.

api.name: ErrImpossibleItem
api.doc: ErrImpossibleItem identifies an item that fits no eligible container.

api.name: ErrInexactResolution
api.doc:
ErrInexactResolution identifies a quantity not exactly representable on
the selected lattice.

api.name: ErrInsufficientStock
api.doc: ErrInsufficientStock identifies finite stock unable to satisfy the request.

api.name: ErrInternalInvariant
api.doc:
ErrInternalInvariant identifies solver output rejected by independent
verification and is always a release-blocking defect.

api.name: ErrInvalidContainer
api.doc: ErrInvalidContainer identifies container-domain validation failure.

api.name: ErrInvalidItem
api.doc: ErrInvalidItem identifies item-domain validation failure.

api.name: ErrInvalidOptions
api.doc: ErrInvalidOptions identifies zero, conflicting, or unsupported options.

api.name: ErrInvalidRequest
api.doc: ErrInvalidRequest identifies an invalid or contradictory request.

api.name: ErrMemoryBudgetExhausted
api.doc:
ErrMemoryBudgetExhausted identifies rejected estimated working memory and
supports errors.Is with ErrBudgetExhausted.

api.name: ErrNoFeasiblePlacement
api.doc:
ErrNoFeasiblePlacement identifies search without a feasible candidate; it
does not prove mathematical infeasibility.

api.name: ErrOverflow
api.doc: ErrOverflow identifies checked arithmetic outside the int64 lattice.

api.name: ErrOverweightItem
api.doc: ErrOverweightItem identifies an item exceeding every eligible weight cap.

api.name: ErrProvenInfeasible
api.doc: ErrProvenInfeasible identifies exhaustive bounded proof of infeasibility.

api.name: MaxCallbacks
api.doc: MaxCallbacks bounds synchronous predicates attached to one operation.

api.name: Decision.Accepted
api.doc: Accepted reports whether packing may retain the candidate.

api.name: Decision.Code
api.doc: Code is the stable application rejection identifier.

api.name: Decision.Message
api.doc: Message is the bounded human-readable rejection explanation.

api.name: Accept
api.doc: Accept constructs a valid acceptance decision.

api.name: Evaluate
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, callback Placement, view PlacementView) (decision Decision, err error)
api.doc: Evaluate invokes a callback with panic conversion and decision validation.

api.name: NewPlacementView
api.signature: func(item knapsack.NormalizedItem, container knapsack.NormalizedContainer, candidate knapsack.Placement, placements []knapsack.Placement) (PlacementView, error)
api.doc:
NewPlacementView allows at most 10,000 prior placements and a conservative
16 MiB owned-copy estimate before defensively copying callback-visible state.

api.name: Reject
api.doc: Reject constructs a rejection decision validated when the callback returns.

api.name: ValidateCallbacks
api.doc:
ValidateCallbacks rejects excessive, nil, and typed-nil callback lists
before callers clone or execute them.

api.name: ValidateDecision
api.doc: ValidateDecision rejects contradictory, empty, or oversized decisions.

api.name: PlacementView.Candidate
api.doc: Candidate returns a defensive copy of the proposed placement.

api.name: PlacementView.Container
api.doc: Container returns a defensive copy of the target container type.

api.name: PlacementView.Item
api.doc: Item returns a defensive copy of the candidate item.

api.name: PlacementView.Placements
api.doc: Placements returns defensive copies of placements already in the container.

api.name: Decision
api.doc:
Decision is a bounded acceptance or rejection returned by a placement
callback.

api.name: Placement
api.doc:
Placement is the narrow synchronous custom feasibility extension point.
Implementations must be deterministic, bounded, and honor context.

api.name: PlacementView
api.doc: PlacementView owns copies of every collection supplied to a callback.

api.name: ErrCallbackPanic
api.doc: ErrCallbackPanic wraps a panic raised by application callback code.

api.name: ErrInvalidConstraint
api.doc: ErrInvalidConstraint identifies nil or typed-nil callback values.

api.name: ErrInvalidDecision
api.doc: ErrInvalidDecision identifies malformed callback output.

api.name: ErrViewLimit
api.doc: ErrViewLimit identifies callback input that exceeds safe copy bounds.

api.name: Version
api.doc: Version is the canonical request and plan schema emitted by this package.

api.name: Limits.MaxBytes
api.doc: MaxBytes is the maximum UTF-8 JSON byte length.

api.name: Limits.MaxCollection
api.doc: MaxCollection is the maximum members in any one object or array.

api.name: Limits.MaxDepth
api.doc: MaxDepth is the maximum nested object or array depth.

api.name: DefaultLimits
api.doc: DefaultLimits returns conservative bounds for untrusted JSON input.

api.name: MarshalPlan
api.doc: MarshalPlan returns deterministic versioned JSON for an immutable plan.

api.name: MarshalRequest
api.doc:
MarshalRequest returns deterministic versioned JSON preserving exact lattice
quantities and normalized request limits.

api.name: UnmarshalPlan
api.doc: UnmarshalPlan strictly decodes and validates a versioned immutable plan.

api.name: UnmarshalRequest
api.doc:
UnmarshalRequest strictly decodes and validates a versioned normalized
request. It rejects unknown fields, duplicate keys, trailing data, invalid
UTF-8, unsupported versions, and resource-limit violations.

api.name: Limits
api.doc:
Limits bounds JSON size, nesting depth, and collection cardinality before
decoded values reach the domain constructors.

api.name: ErrDuplicateKey
api.doc: ErrDuplicateKey identifies an object containing the same key twice.

api.name: ErrEncodingLimit
api.doc: ErrEncodingLimit identifies input rejected by a decoding resource bound.

api.name: ErrInvalidEncoding
api.doc: ErrInvalidEncoding identifies malformed or non-canonical JSON input.

api.name: ErrUnsupportedVersion
api.doc: ErrUnsupportedVersion identifies an unknown request or plan schema.

api.name: OrientationXYZ
api.doc: OrientationXYZ preserves the original X, Y, and Z axes.

api.name: OrientationXZY
api.doc: OrientationXZY swaps the original Y and Z axes.

api.name: OrientationYXZ
api.doc: OrientationYXZ swaps the original X and Y axes.

api.name: OrientationYZX
api.doc: OrientationYZX maps the original axes to Y, Z, and X.

api.name: OrientationZXY
api.doc: OrientationZXY maps the original axes to Z, X, and Y.

api.name: OrientationZYX
api.doc: OrientationZYX reverses the original axis order.

api.name: Dimensions.X
api.doc: X, Y, and Z are positive lattice lengths.

api.name: Dimensions.Y
api.doc: X, Y, and Z are positive lattice lengths.

api.name: Dimensions.Z
api.doc: X, Y, and Z are positive lattice lengths.

api.name: Point.X
api.doc: X, Y, and Z are non-negative lattice coordinates.

api.name: Point.Y
api.doc: X, Y, and Z are non-negative lattice coordinates.

api.name: Point.Z
api.doc: X, Y, and Z are non-negative lattice coordinates.

api.name: NewCuboid
api.doc: NewCuboid validates coordinates, dimensions, and endpoint arithmetic.

api.name: Orientations
api.doc: Orientations returns canonical unique orthogonal rotations.

api.name: Cuboid.Adjacent
api.doc: Adjacent reports contact along a face with positive contact area.

api.name: Cuboid.Contains
api.doc: Contains reports complete half-open containment.

api.name: Cuboid.Dimensions
api.doc: Dimensions returns the cuboid's lattice lengths.

api.name: Cuboid.Intersects
api.doc: Intersects reports positive-volume intersection. Touching is permitted.

api.name: Cuboid.Max
api.doc: Max returns the exclusive upper corner.

api.name: Cuboid.Origin
api.doc: Origin returns the inclusive lower corner.

api.name: Cuboid.SupportArea
api.doc: SupportArea returns the XY contact area when c directly supports other.

api.name: Cuboid.Volume
api.doc: Volume returns the checked lattice volume.

api.name: Dimensions.Valid
api.doc: Valid reports whether all dimensions are positive.

api.name: Dimensions.Volume
api.doc: Volume returns the checked cuboid volume.

api.name: Orientation.Apply
api.doc: Apply returns dimensions after the physical-axis permutation.

api.name: Cuboid
api.doc: Cuboid is a validated half-open occupied region.

api.name: Dimensions
api.doc: Dimensions names the physical axes of a cuboid.

api.name: Orientation
api.doc: Orientation identifies how the original physical axes map to X, Y, and Z.

api.name: Point
api.doc: Point is an integer-lattice origin.

api.name: ErrInvalidCoordinate
api.doc: ErrInvalidCoordinate identifies a negative lattice coordinate.

api.name: ErrInvalidDimensions
api.doc: ErrInvalidDimensions identifies non-positive cuboid dimensions.

api.name: ErrInvalidOrientation
api.doc: ErrInvalidOrientation identifies an unknown axis permutation.

api.name: ErrOverflow
api.doc: ErrOverflow identifies a geometric result outside the int64 lattice.

api.name: RequireCanonicalEqual
api.doc:
RequireCanonicalEqual fails the test unless both plans have identical
deterministic canonical encodings.

api.name: RequireVerified
api.signature: func(t testing.TB, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, plan knapsack.Plan, options verify.Options)
api.doc: RequireVerified fails the test when independent verification rejects plan.

api.name: ContainerCount
api.doc: ContainerCount minimizes or maximizes the number of container instances.

api.name: Max
api.doc: Max prefers the higher exact value.

api.name: MaximumUsedHeight
api.doc: MaximumUsedHeight measures the highest exclusive placement coordinate.

api.name: Min
api.doc: Min prefers the lower exact value.

api.name: PackedPriority
api.doc: PackedPriority sums exact caller-provided item priorities.

api.name: TotalPackagingCost
api.doc: TotalPackagingCost is reserved for exact monetary objective adapters.

api.name: UnusedVolume
api.doc: UnusedVolume measures unused lattice volume across selected containers.

api.name: UnusedWeight
api.doc: UnusedWeight measures remaining content-weight capacity.

api.name: WeightImbalance
api.doc: WeightImbalance measures the heaviest-minus-lightest content weight.

api.name: Criterion.Direction
api.doc: Direction selects minimization or maximization.

api.name: Criterion.Metric
api.doc: Metric is the exact plan property to evaluate.

api.name: Score.TieBreak
api.doc: TieBreak is compared lexically only after every criterion is equal.

api.name: Score.Values
api.doc: Values correspond positionally to Objective.Criteria.

api.name: Maximize
api.doc: Maximize constructs a maximizing criterion.

api.name: Minimize
api.doc: Minimize constructs a minimizing criterion.

api.name: New
api.doc: New validates and defensively copies a nonempty criterion list.

api.name: SafeCompare
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, objective PlanObjective, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, left, right knapsack.Plan) (comparison int, err error)
api.doc:
SafeCompare invokes a plan objective with validation, panic conversion, and
a canonical final tie-break.

api.name: SafeComponents
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, objective PlanObjective, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, plan knapsack.Plan) (components []knapsack.ScoreComponent, err error)
api.doc: SafeComponents invokes a plan objective and bounds its serialized result.

api.name: Objective.Compare
api.doc:
Compare returns negative when left is preferred, positive when right is
preferred, and zero only for canonically identical scores.

api.name: Objective.ComparePlans
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, left, right knapsack.Plan) (int, error)
api.doc: ComparePlans scores two plans and returns the exact lexicographic ordering.

api.name: Objective.Components
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, plan knapsack.Plan) ([]knapsack.ScoreComponent, error)
api.doc: Components returns bounded serializable score evidence for a plan.

api.name: Objective.Criteria
api.doc: Criteria returns a defensive copy in precedence order.

api.name: Objective.ScorePlan
api.doc:
ScorePlan computes exact values and serializable components without binary
floating-point conversion.

api.name: Objective.Valid
api.doc: Valid reports whether the objective has at least one validated criterion.

api.name: Criterion
api.doc: Criterion pairs a metric with its lexicographic comparison direction.

api.name: Direction
api.doc: Direction controls whether lower or higher metric values are preferred.

api.name: Metric
api.doc: Metric identifies an exact plan property used in lexicographic comparison.

api.name: Objective
api.doc: Objective is an immutable ordered lexicographic objective.

api.name: PlanObjective
api.doc:
PlanObjective is the immutable extension boundary for complete-plan
comparison. Implementations receive value objects whose collection accessors
return copies. They must honor context cancellation and remain deterministic.

api.name: Score
api.doc: Score contains exact criterion values followed by a canonical tie-break.

api.name: ErrCallbackPanic
api.doc: ErrCallbackPanic wraps a panic raised by a custom plan objective.

api.name: ErrInvalidObjective
api.doc:
ErrInvalidObjective identifies an empty, contradictory, or malformed
built-in or custom objective.

api.name: Limits.MaxIDBytes
api.doc: MaxIDBytes bounds each container type identifier.

api.name: Limits.MaxTypes
api.doc: MaxTypes bounds configured container type costs.

api.name: DefaultLimits
api.doc: DefaultLimits returns conservative limits for untrusted cost maps.

api.name: New
api.doc: New validates and copies a cost map using DefaultLimits.

api.name: NewWithLimits
api.doc:
NewWithLimits validates, sorts, and defensively copies a bounded nonempty
single-currency cost map.

api.name: Costs.Compare
api.doc: Compare prefers lower exact cost, then canonical plan bytes for ties.

api.name: Costs.ComparePlans
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, _ knapsack.NormalizedRequest, left, right knapsack.Plan) (int, error)
api.doc: ComparePlans implements objective.PlanObjective with context cancellation.

api.name: Costs.Components
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, _ knapsack.NormalizedRequest, plan knapsack.Plan) ([]knapsack.ScoreComponent, error)
api.doc: Components returns the exact total packaging cost and ISO currency unit.

api.name: Costs.Total
api.doc: Total sums configured exact costs for every selected container instance.

api.name: Costs.Valid
api.doc: Valid reports whether the objective contains aligned type IDs and costs.

api.name: Costs
api.doc:
Costs is an immutable exact packaging-cost objective keyed by container
type ID.

api.name: Limits
api.doc: Limits bounds the cost-map collections copied by NewWithLimits.

api.name: ErrInvalidCosts
api.doc: ErrInvalidCosts identifies empty, invalid, or mixed-currency cost maps.

api.name: ErrMissingCost
api.doc:
ErrMissingCost identifies a selected container type without a configured
packaging cost.

api.name: Options.AllowUnpacked
api.doc: AllowUnpacked permits verified best-known plans that omit items.

api.name: Options.Constraints
api.doc: Constraints are synchronous bounded custom placement predicates.

api.name: Options.Objective
api.doc:
Objective is the built-in exact lexicographic objective. It conflicts
with PlanObjective when both are set.

api.name: Options.PlanObjective
api.doc: PlanObjective is a custom complete-plan comparison extension.

api.name: Options.Seed
api.doc:
Seed is recorded for reproducibility; built-in solvers use no ambient
randomness.

api.name: Exact.PackAll
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, options Options) (knapsack.Plan, error)
api.doc:
PackAll exhaustively considers bounded container multisets in increasing
container-count order, then exhaustively searches every multiset at the
first feasible count. Its built-in proof objective is container count with a
canonical plan tie-break.

api.name: Exact.PackFixed
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, instances []knapsack.ContainerInstance, options Options) (knapsack.Plan, error)
api.doc:
PackFixed exhaustively enumerates compact placements in exactly the supplied
finite instances. It reports optimal only after completing bounded search.

api.name: Heuristic.PackAll
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, options Options) (knapsack.Plan, error)
api.doc:
PackAll uses deterministic extreme points and never reports heuristic
optimality or proven infeasibility.

api.name: Heuristic.PackFixed
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, instances []knapsack.ContainerInstance, options Options) (knapsack.Plan, error)
api.doc:
PackFixed packs into exactly the supplied finite instances and never creates
another container. Unpacked items are reported without a false infeasibility
proof.

api.name: Exact
api.doc:
Exact exhaustively enumerates compact orthogonal placements for bounded
small fixed-container instances. It is intended as an oracle, not a
large-order solver.

api.name: Heuristic
api.doc: Heuristic is the deterministic bounded extreme-point solver.

api.name: Options
api.doc:
Options selects deterministic solver extensions and partial-result policy.
Collection fields are read through immutable callback views.

api.name: CodeAccounting
api.doc: CodeAccounting reports serialized statistics differing from recomputation.

api.name: CodeAlteredItem
api.doc: CodeAlteredItem reports plan dimensions or weight changed from input.

api.name: CodeCenterOfGravity
api.doc: CodeCenterOfGravity reports content mass outside configured axis bounds.

api.name: CodeConstraint
api.doc: CodeConstraint reports failure while replaying a custom constraint.

api.name: CodeDuplicateItem
api.doc: CodeDuplicateItem reports repeated or packed-and-unpacked item identity.

api.name: CodeEligibility
api.doc: CodeEligibility reports a class disallowed by a container.

api.name: CodeForbiddenOrientation
api.doc: CodeForbiddenOrientation reports an orientation absent from the item.

api.name: CodeFragile
api.doc: CodeFragile reports a placement bearing on a fragile top.

api.name: CodeGrouping
api.doc: CodeGrouping reports required co-location violated.

api.name: CodeIncompatible
api.doc: CodeIncompatible reports incompatible item groups sharing a container.

api.name: CodeLoadBearing
api.doc: CodeLoadBearing reports transitive supported load exceeded.

api.name: CodeMissingItem
api.doc: CodeMissingItem reports a required item omitted from the plan.

api.name: CodeObjective
api.doc: CodeObjective reports objective components differing from recomputation.

api.name: CodeOutsideContainer
api.doc: CodeOutsideContainer reports a placement outside usable bounds.

api.name: CodeOverflow
api.doc: CodeOverflow reports checked geometric or aggregate arithmetic overflow.

api.name: CodeOverlap
api.doc: CodeOverlap reports positive-volume intersection between items.

api.name: CodeOverweight
api.doc: CodeOverweight reports content or gross-weight capacity exceeded.

api.name: CodeProofStatus
api.doc: CodeProofStatus reports inconsistent status, termination, content, or proof.

api.name: CodeReservedOverlap
api.doc: CodeReservedOverlap reports intersection with reserved container space.

api.name: CodeStackLimit
api.doc: CodeStackLimit reports maximum stack depth exceeded.

api.name: CodeStock
api.doc: CodeStock reports finite stock or maximum item count exceeded.

api.name: CodeSupportRelationship
api.doc: CodeSupportRelationship reports stale or altered supporter metadata.

api.name: CodeUnknownContainer
api.doc: CodeUnknownContainer reports an unknown type or instance ID.

api.name: CodeUnknownItem
api.doc: CodeUnknownItem reports an item ID absent from the request.

api.name: CodeUnsupported
api.doc: CodeUnsupported reports insufficient geometric support area.

api.name: Violation.Code
api.doc: Code is the stable machine-readable category.

api.name: Violation.ContainerID
api.doc: ContainerID identifies the affected instance or type when applicable.

api.name: Violation.ItemID
api.doc: ItemID identifies the affected item, or is empty for plan-wide findings.

api.name: Violation.Message
api.doc: Message is a bounded human-readable explanation.

api.name: AllowUnpacked
api.doc: AllowUnpacked accepts items listed exactly once in UnpackedItemIDs.

api.name: Plan
api.signature: func(request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, plan knapsack.Plan, options Options) Result
api.doc: Plan recomputes feasibility and statistics without using solver predicates.

api.name: PlanContext
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, plan knapsack.Plan, options Options) (Result, error)
api.doc:
PlanContext performs the same independent verification as Plan while
allowing callers to stop adversarial or no-longer-needed verification work.

api.name: PlanJSON
api.signature: func(ctx context.Context, request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, input []byte, limits packingjson.Limits, options Options) (Result, error)
api.doc:
PlanJSON strictly decodes a fresh plan value before independently verifying
it. The supplied byte slice is never retained.

api.name: RequireAll
api.doc: RequireAll requires every request item to appear exactly once as a placement.

api.name: Options.WithConstraints
api.doc:
WithConstraints requires the verifier to replay application placement
constraints against immutable request and plan views.

api.name: Options.WithObjective
api.doc:
WithObjective requires the verifier to recompute the configured objective
from immutable request and plan values.

api.name: Result.Err
api.doc:
Err returns a cancellation or custom-extension error encountered during
verification; callers must inspect it independently from Valid.

api.name: Result.Has
api.doc: Has reports whether at least one finding has code.

api.name: Result.Truncated
api.doc: Truncated reports whether MaxDiagnostics suppressed additional findings.

api.name: Result.Valid
api.doc: Valid reports whether no violation was found.

api.name: Result.Violations
api.doc: Violations returns a defensive copy in deterministic discovery order.

api.name: Code
api.doc: Code is a stable machine-readable verifier violation category.

api.name: Options
api.doc: Options selects item-conservation and custom-extension verification policy.

api.name: Result
api.doc: Result contains independent verification findings and callback errors.

api.name: Violation
api.doc:
Violation is a bounded verifier finding scoped to an item or container when
applicable.

api.name: SVG
api.signature: func(request knapsack.NormalizedRequest, plan knapsack.Plan, options verify.Options) (string, error)
api.doc: SVG renders a deterministic top-down scene with escaped untrusted labels.

api.name: ErrRenderLimit
api.doc:
ErrRenderLimit identifies coordinates or output geometry beyond the
bounded SVG profile.

api.name: ErrUnverifiedPlan
api.doc: ErrUnverifiedPlan identifies rendering input rejected by the verifier.

boxpacker_features.semantic_scope: exact content and optional gross limits
lattice origin, oriented dimensions, and supporters
exact rational transitive support loads and content center-of-gravity bounds
integer cuboids, unrestricted rotation, weight, pack-all
identical verified common subset with startup, serialization, RSS, and deadline treatment

mutation.survivor_policy: kill or classify with concrete proof

benchmarks.semantic_normalization: identical lattice, weights, rotations, stock, constraints, and objectives

resource_limits.limit: members per JSON object or array
bytes per monetary container type ID

limitations.reason: only deterministic sequential solvers are implemented
Go cannot preempt arbitrary in-process code; callbacks are supported only as trusted synchronous application extensions and must honor context cooperatively
math and measurement use local v0.0.0 replacements and are not resolvable from an isolated source archive
PHP and Go do not expose comparable allocation counts across process boundaries
the initial v1 schema has no previously released library or schema; v1 fixtures establish the predecessor contract for the first transition
discrete support and load model only
